title: GraceCraftExtender
description: Entitys Will spawn randomly from 30 seconds to 3 Minutes, working on extra things like config menu
body:
Please have [ GraceCraft - ohiomannnn ] Installed for this to work

Entities will randomly spawn every 30 seconds - 3 minutes

Manually spawn Entities using /spawnentity

More updates soon (probably)

Working On :
Speed Lines
More Entities
AFK Mode
Config Menu
